overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Mafia III) showing a character running through a rainy night in a New Orleans-style residential district. The character navigates wet sidewalks lined with historic shotgun houses, passes a distinctive ornate home with balconies, crosses a street intersection, and continues through the atmospheric neighborhood.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with historic homes and parked cars

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the wet sidewalk past parked vintage cars and street lamps

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with black umbrella walking toward camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: red and silver vintage telephone booth on the sidewalk corner
light blue 1960s sedan parked along the curb
two-story historic home with elaborate white balconies and columns
tall curved street lamps illuminating the wet pavement
crisscrossing utility wires spanning the street

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a rain-slicked residential sidewalk at night, passing a vintage telephone booth and parked cars. Street lamps cast yellow light on the wet pavement as the character approaches an ornate historic home with white balconies.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone between ornate homes and damaged buildings

events.description: passing from well-maintained ornate architecture to a fire-damaged blackened building

agents.ego_description: continuing to run past the ornate house and alongside a burned-out building

notable_agents.action: pedestrian carrying a black umbrella walking toward the camera

entered.detail: charred dark building with broken windows and fire damage
red octagonal stop sign at the approaching intersection
white residential mailbox on a post near the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character runs past the ornate white house and transitions to a more dilapidated area featuring a prominent burned-out building with charred walls. The sidewalk continues past utility poles and a mailbox as the character approaches a street corner with a stop sign.

events.description: character steps onto crosswalk and crosses the street while vehicles pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk while watching for traffic

notable_agents.action: green vintage truck driving through the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing on the asphalt street
large metal lattice tower for power lines visible beyond the intersection
weathered wooden picket fence lining the opposite sidewalk
single-story homes with porches behind the wooden fence

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street at a marked crosswalk, navigating between passing vehicles including a green truck. After crossing, the character continues along a sidewalk bordered by wooden fences and residential homes, with a large electricity pylon visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked residential district at night, transitioning from well-preserved historic homes to a more dilapidated urban landscape. It begins with the character running along a wet sidewalk past a vintage telephone booth and parked cars, guided by the yellow glow of street lamps toward an ornate house with white balconies. As the character passes this residence, the environment shifts toward a weathered area featuring a charred, burned-out building and utility poles before reaching a street corner. The scene then opens up as the character crosses a marked intersection between passing vehicles, including a green truck, before finally continuing along a sidewalk bordered by wooden fences and residential homes with a large electricity pylon looming in the distance.
